alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations and partnering with senior stakeholders across Product, Engineering, and cross-functional teams; demonstrated ability to influence executives and advise on strategic decisions
alignments.job_requirement: Build and maintain relationships with senior-level advertising decision-makers, delivering strategic guidance

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs and commercial scaling initiatives, developing strategic plans and execution roadmaps; however, experience is operations and transformation-focused, not advertising or client revenue growth optimization
alignments.job_requirement: Develop and execute structured account plans to drive advertiser ROI and long-term revenue growth

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations background suggests analytical capability and business case development; no specific evidence of sales narrative or advertising ROI modeling presented
alignments.job_requirement: Translate analytical insights into compelling commercial narratives and quantify opportunities through clear, data-driven business cases

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years of transformation and commercial scaling work demonstrates comfort with ambiguity and cross-functional leadership; proven ability to partner across Product, Engineering, Marketing, Policy, and Operations
alignments.job_requirement: Operate in ambiguous, fast-changing environments and lead cross-functional collaboration

gaps.gap: Pure quota-carrying sales experience and full sales cycle ownership (prospecting, qualification, closing, revenue target accountability)
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's strategy, operations, and transformation background provides structured business thinking and stakeholder management, but lacks hands-on sales execution and personal revenue responsibility; could require 6–9 months of sales onboarding to build pipeline and closing competency

gaps.gap: Advertising and performance marketing domain expertise; no demonstrated background in digital ads, advertiser success metrics, or ad platform economics
gaps.mitigation: Domain is learnable with mentorship and product knowledge transfer, but represents a meaningful ramp-up cost; candidate would benefit from early immersion with existing ads sellers and customer portfolio

gaps.gap: Limited client-facing sales consulting background; experience is internal transformation and operations rather than external client advisory relationships
gaps.mitigation: Senior stakeholder management and advisory skills transfer from internal cross-functional work, but external client sales cycles and negotiation dynamics differ; role requires immediate credibility with C-suite advertising buyers

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience closing complex commercial agreements or negotiating high-stakes ad contracts
gaps.mitigation: Structured operations and strategy background suggests contract literacy, but deal-closing and negotiation confidence and patterns are unproven in a quota-carrying context

output.summary: This is a pure quota-carrying sales role (prospecting, closing, revenue target ownership) in the advertising domain. The candidate is a Strategy and Operations / Product Operations leader with strong cross-functional and stakeholder leadership, but lacks direct sales cycle execution, advertising domain expertise, and personal revenue responsibility. Role-family fit is low because the core function is sales, not strategy, ops, or transformation. While seniority appears appropriate (8 years, L4-L5 scope), the functional mismatch and gap in sales execution make this a poor fit. Advisory: skip.
uncertainties: Extent of the candidate's exposure to advertising or performance marketing concepts in Google Devices and Services operations
Whether any of the transformation or commercial scaling work involved customer-facing sales cycles or revenue negotiation
Candidate's appetite and readiness to transition from strategy/ops into a revenue-focused sales role
Singapore relocation feasibility and visa considerations
